name: ORIGIN_DIVERSITY_RANKING
description: Origin diversity ranking. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_diversity, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY targetpair_diversity DESC, patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: How are organizations or individuals from UK ranked by target-pair diversity?
How are organizations or individuals from China ranked by target-pair diversity?
How are organizations or individuals from US ranked by target-pair diversity?
